visualizerParams.title: Bogo Sort Infinite Loop Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The bogo sort algorithm seems to be running infinitely even on very small lists. It seems the condition to stop the shuffling is never met. Find and fix the error in the sorted check.

solution.explanation: The `is_sorted` function had an off-by-one error in its loop range. `range(len(a))` caused an `IndexError` when accessing `a[i+1]` on the last element. In some environments, this might be caught as a logic error or crash the script. The range should be `len(a) - 1`.
